main_headline: Real-time NBA playoff data for the night of May 2–3, 2026 could not be retrieved due to search and Reddit fetch unavailability. The digest below reflects a data-unavailable state rather than fabricated scores.
sub_headline: No verified game results, box scores, or series updates could be confirmed for last night's playoff action.

recaps.title: Search Unavailable — No Game Data Retrieved
recaps.body: Attempts to search for NBA playoff scores, results, standings, highlights, and performances dated 2026-05-03 returned no usable data. The requested search query 'NBA playoff scores results standings highlights performances 2026-05-03' could not be executed against a live data source. Reddit fetch for r/nba fan sentiment and discourse was also unavailable. As a result, no game recaps, box scores, or series statuses can be reported with factual accuracy for the night of May 2, 2026.

recaps.title: Why This Digest Is Empty
recaps.body: This system does not fabricate sports scores, statistics, or game outcomes. Presenting invented results as real playoff data would be misleading. Once live search access is restored or verified box score data is provided, a full structured digest including game scores, standout performances, series standings, and fan sentiment from r/nba can be generated accurately.

headlines.body: No live search results were returned for NBA playoff activity on the night of May 2–3, 2026. All fields requiring real game data are left empty to preserve accuracy.
r/nba community discourse and fan sentiment threads could not be accessed. Post-game reactions, player takes, and trending topics from the subreddit are unavailable for this digest.

To generate a complete and accurate digest, please provide verified box score data, game results, or restore search tool access so live NBA playoff information can be retrieved and structured properly.
